about.title: Your Strategic Partner for Global Industrial Outsourcing
about.text1: Founded in Turin in 1969, with strong roots in European mechanical engineering, we have transformed decades of experience into an operational model designed to meet the challenges of today's global industry.
about.text2: Today, we are a trusted partner in the supply of custom-engineered industrial components, operating both as a technical-commercial agency and as a project manager, providing a single point of contact responsible for coordinating multiple product categories.
about.text3: Thanks to a network of qualified suppliers across Europe, China and India, combined with extensive expertise in international logistics, we connect your projects with the most suitable global manufacturing technologies, ensuring flexibility, reliability and a customer-focused approach tailored to your specific needs.

agency.label: Technical & Commercial Agency
agency.description: We act as a strategic partner on the ground, connecting the needs of manufacturing companies with the technological capabilities of leading production facilities and foundries.
agency.card1Description: We analyze the customer's technical drawings to identify the most suitable and cost-effective manufacturing technology.
agency.card2Description: We oversee the entire process, from quotation and cost evaluation to tooling and mold production, through to sample validation and approval.
agency.card3Description: We ensure seamless communication and continuous engineering support between the customer and the manufacturing facility.

procurement.label: Lead Contractor & Global Procurement Services
procurement.description: We serve as a single point of contact responsible for sourcing mechanical components, castings, and complex subassemblies, relieving customers from the challenges of managing fragmented supply chains.
procurement.card1Description: We leverage a network of carefully selected and certified suppliers across Europe, China, and India, ensuring full compliance with Western quality standards through regular audits and on-site inspections.
procurement.card2Description: We centralize the procurement of components manufactured through different technologies—including stamping, foundry processes, and CNC machining—delivering complete packages or fully integrated subassemblies.
procurement.card3Description: We coordinate order planning and international logistics flows. Our structure allows us to consolidate purchases and shipments from multiple European suppliers to overseas markets (e.g., containerized ocean freight to the U.S. market), optimizing logistics costs and operational efficiency.

whyChooseUs.title: One Partner. Greater Efficiency. Less Complexity.
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Why Choose Us

slide1.label: Decades of Experience
slide1.text: More than 50 years in the industrial sector have enabled us to build a network of qualified suppliers and develop technical expertise that is difficult to replicate.
